bashCommands: ls -la data/ && echo "---SIZES---" && du -h data/*
node scripts/preprocess.mjs && ls -la public/data
grep -n "header(" src/detail.ts

cd src && sed -i '' 's/header(a.nm || a.n, a.n, true)/header(a.nm || a.n, a.n)/; s/header(c.n, c.d, true)/header(c.n, c.d)/; s/header(p.name, "Planet", true)/header(p.name, "Planet")/' detail.ts && grep -n "header(" detail.ts
cd /Users/mvalstar/projects/nasa-claude-opus-4.8-med/2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium && pnpm install 2>&1 | tail -20
pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -40
pnpm install 2>&1 | tail -8
cat pnpm-workspace.yaml 2>/dev/null; echo "EXISTS?"
pnpm install 2>&1 | tail -8
pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -40
pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -40

cd /Users/mvalstar/projects/nasa-claude-opus-4.8-med/2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium
echo "=== dist tree ==="; ls -R dist | head -40
echo "=== relative URLs in index.html ==="; grep -o 'src="[^"]*"\|href="[^"]*"' dist/index.html
echo "=== data dir size ==="; du -sh dist/data

cd /Users/mvalstar/projects/nasa-claude-opus-4.8-med/2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium
ls node_modules/.bin | grep -iE "playwright|puppeteer" || echo "none-local"
which chromium chrome google-chrome-stable 2>/dev/null
ls "/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome" 2>/dev/null && echo "CHROME-FOUND"
npx --no-install playwright --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no-playwright"

cd /Users/mvalstar/projects/nasa-claude-opus-4.8-med/2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium/dist
python3 -m http.server 8123 >/tmp/httpd.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /tmp/httpd.pid
sleep 1
SP=/private/tmp/claude-502/-Users-mvalstar-projects-nasa-claude-opus-4-8-med-2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium/e2ab69d3-dfdf-4883-8548-b70aa0fcaa9e/scratchpad
node $SP/smoke.mjs "http://localhost:8123/" "$SP/shot.png" 2>&1 | tail -40
kill $(cat /tmp/httpd.pid) 2>/dev/null
grep -i "GET\|404" /tmp/httpd.log | grep -v " 200 " | head

cd /Users/mvalstar/projects/nasa-claude-opus-4.8-med/2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium/dist
python3 -m http.server 8123 >/tmp/httpd.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /tmp/httpd.pid
sleep 1
SP=/private/tmp/claude-502/-Users-mvalstar-projects-nasa-claude-opus-4-8-med-2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium/e2ab69d3-dfdf-4883-8548-b70aa0fcaa9e/scratchpad
node $SP/interact.mjs "$SP" 2>&1 | tail -20
kill $(cat /tmp/httpd.pid) 2>/dev/null
pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -6

cd /Users/mvalstar/projects/nasa-claude-opus-4.8-med/2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium/dist
python3 -m http.server 8123 >/tmp/httpd.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /tmp/httpd.pid
sleep 1
SP=/private/tmp/claude-502/-Users-mvalstar-projects-nasa-claude-opus-4-8-med-2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium/e2ab69d3-dfdf-4883-8548-b70aa0fcaa9e/scratchpad
# deep link: Apophis (a:403), paused, color by ecc, follow on
node $SP/smoke.mjs "http://localhost:8123/#jd=2462000.0&play=0&color=2&sel=a:403&follow=1" "$SP/deeplink.png" 2>&1 | tail -25
echo "=== favicon check ==="; grep -c favicon /tmp/httpd.log; grep "404" /tmp/httpd.log | head
kill $(cat /tmp/httpd.pid) 2>/dev/null

cd /Users/mvalstar/projects/nasa-claude-opus-4.8-med/2026-06-19-15-34-26-claude-code-opus-4-8-medium
pkill -f "http.server 8123" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "Google Chrome.*smoke-prof" 2>/dev/null
echo "data/ files (untouched):"; ls -la data/ | awk '{print $9}' | grep -v '^$'
echo "--- dist self-contained check ---"; ls dist; echo "data copy:"; ls dist/data | wc -l | xargs echo "files in dist/data:"
